title: Creating custom PowerToys Run plugins
author: {"twitter"=>"hlaueriksson"}
summary: PowerToys Run is a quick launcher for Windows. It is open-source and modular for additional plugins. Official plugins include: Calculator Unit Converter Value Generator Windows Search At the time of writing, there are 20 plugins out of the box. If you think the official plugins are not enough, you can write our own. The easiest way to get started is…

title: Introducing LoFuUnit
